offer: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, inefficient reconciliation causes late payments. We automate bank statement matching instead of manual reconciliation of bank statements and ledgers.
problem: inefficient reconciliation processes leading to late payments
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for exceptions and email notifications for reconciliation issues on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Create a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
